title: pelargonium × avronianum
intro: Pelargonium × avronianum, commonly known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium graveolens and Pelargonium tomentosum. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to alleviate anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and reduce menstrual cramps, among others. Rose Geranium can be prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health issues.
